name: NullPointerException when parsing empty payload
description: A clear, reproducible crash: the parser dereferences a field that is absent on an empty payload. A high-confidence diagnostic should localize the null dereference to the parser.
issue_title: App crashes with NullPointerException on empty upload
issue_body: When a user uploads an empty file, the app crashes with a NullPointerException. Stack trace points at the parser reading a field without a null check. Repro: upload a 0-byte file, hit /import.
